name: Open Faced Healthy Tuna Melt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the tuna, onion, olives, tomato, and parsley.
2. Add olive oil and red wine vinegar to the mixture.
3. Toss gently until all ingredients are well coated.
4. Mound the mixture onto halved pitas.
5. Top with crumbled feta cheese.
6. Place under the broiler.
7. Cook until the cheese is melted.
8. Serve hot.
